values.unknown_flag: If unspecified, the flag type is unknown by default
values.soft_bounce: Refers to a non critical error received while sending the email(s). Soft bounced emails are retried
values.hard_bounce: Refers to a critical error that happened while sending the email(s)
values.spam: Refers to an email considered as spam
values.mailbox_full: Refers to an undelivered email because the recipient mailbox is full
values.mailbox_not_found: Refers to an undelivered email because the recipient mailbox does not exist
values.greylisted: Refers to an email slightly delayed by the recipient to ensure that Scaleway is not sending spam
values.send_before_expiration: Refers to an email with a `send-before` tag to indicate the maximum time limit for the email to be sent
values.blocklisted: Refers to an email blocked by a blocklist
